name: openclaw--skills--agent-wal
description: Write-Ahead Log protocol for agent state persistence. Prevents losing corrections, decisions, and context during conversation compaction. Use when: (1) receiving a user correction — log it before responding, (2) making an important decision or analysis — log it before continuing, (3) pre-compaction memory flush — flush the working buffer to WAL, (4) session start — replay unapplied WAL entries to restore lost context, (5) any time you want to ensure something survives compaction. Use when this capability is needed.
